transcript: Hello? Hello, Jada, how are you? Yeah, um, hi. I'm calling because I got a letter on my door today, and I really need to figure something out. Well, that's an eviction notice. I need you up on Monday. Yeah, I know, but I'm sorry. My bad. Look, can you hear me? Yes, I can hear you. I can hear you. Yes, look, I understand I've been late with my payments, but I'm really in a bad position. I really need something. Like, I need a break here. Please. If I gave a break to all my tenants, I wouldn't be making any money, though, would I? Yes, I understand. If you tell me how much I owe, I can do my best to get it for you, like, as soon as I can. Look, you've been consistently late for the past three months. I'm done with it. I need you out by Monday. Look, look, if I didn't need the help we wouldn't be asking for it so please just work with me here look if you give me $2,500 by Monday then maybe I will kick you out I'm not gonna have that by Monday like you can ask my boss like I'm doing everything I possibly can picking up extra hours I'm working double time I'm sorry can I just go ahead of you please I'm working double time. Yeah, man. $1.50. That sounds like a personal problem. I'm sorry. Can I just go ahead of you, please? I'm just in a rush. Two seconds. Two seconds. Two seconds. What's up, mama? Hello? Yes, can you hear me? Yes, I can hear you. Like I said, $2,500 by Monday or I'm kicking you out. Wait, can you hang on just a second? Hold on. One second. Please do not hang up. All right, mama. That'll be $2.50. Jada, where the hell are you at? You're supposed to be here 10 minutes ago. We're getting fucking packed over here. I'm five minutes away, okay'm i'm rushing there right now i'm right around the corner yo are you serious wait tasha you cannot do that please i really need these hours please hey yo can you hurry up Yo, yo, come on, hurry up yo your car declined you gotta you gotta tasha please just work with me please wait tasha no you can't mama glowing white so your car declined okay one second can you hurry the fuck up yo glowing white just make sure oh shit all right all right all right all right, all right, shit, chill, shit Hey, hey, chill, you don't want to do this, bro Chill Okay, all right, all right Oh, fuck Hello? Hi, baby. Everything okay? Yeah. I love you, too. Hey, I'll be home soon, okay? I promise Yeah Okay You just be a good girl, alright? Okay, bye I'm gonna need a ride What? I need a ride What the fuck? You hear this shit? Come on. Let's go. Fine. Hurry up. Yo, don't fucking push me, man. Walk faster. What I told you, don't push me. Where the fuck am I taking you anyway? Just drive. Stop. Give me the gun. Where the fuck am I taking you anyway? Just drive. Stop! Give me the gun! Thanks for watching!
